concern.description: Required (non-null) when status is 'blocked': what the contract asks for, what makes it impossible as specified, and what would need to change in the plan. Always null when status is 'implemented'.

assumptions.description: Optional. Smallest-reasonable-assumption notes made to resolve a contract ambiguity (not a codebase-understanding question).

blocked_on.description: Optional, meaningful only when status is 'blocked'. 'contract' (the default if omitted): the contract itself is unsatisfiable as specified. 'tests' (implementor only, TDD): the implementor is confident the authored tests — not the contract — contradict the contract; the driver routes this back to the test author instead of retrying the implementor. Not schema-enforced against status, matching this schema's existing concern/status convention.
